title: Chamaenerion stevenii
taxonomy: Chamaenerion stevenii is a species of flowering plant in the family Onagraceae, commonly known as evening primroses. This plant is a perennial herb, native to Europe and Western Asia. It belongs to the genus Chamaenerion, which includes a few species of plants. The genus Chamaenerion is closely related to the genus Epilobium, with some sources considering them to be the same. Chamaenerion stevenii is also known as Steven's willow herb or Steven's willow-herb, although the names might vary slightly depending on the region.
